text:
NOTE: Dependent services provided after the final qualifying skilled service are not 
covered under the home health benefit, except when the dependent service was not 
followed by a qualifying skilled service due to unexpected inpatient admission, death of 
the patient, or some other unanticipated event. 

30.3 - Under the Care of a Physician or Allowed Practitioner 
(Rev. 10438, Issued: 11-06-20, Effective: 03-01-20, Implementation: 01- 11-21)
